name: cinderfall-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper that packages the CINDERFALL web game as native Android (.aab/.apk) and iOS (.ipa) apps. The game itself lives in ../public/game and is copied into ./www at build time — this project adds no game code, only the native shell.

scripts.add:android: npm run sync:www && npx cap add android
scripts.add:ios: npm run sync:www && npx cap add ios
scripts.sync: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync
scripts.build:android: npm run sync && npx cap build android
scripts.build:ios: npm run sync && npx cap build ios
